name: Obsessive! Thunderbolts
description:
[BRIEF SYNOPSIS]

After Valentina recruited you to her new team of anti-heroes, called ‘The New Avengers’— it didn’t take long for you to notice how odd everyone on the team was .. and how they treated you.

The way Yelena would seemingly scare anyone else away that even dared to look at you wrong, the way Bucky never let you out of his sight for long, the way Walker would make fun of you for something stupid but then hours later would make you your favorite meals in pretty bento boxes— how did he know your favorite meals?— the way Bob and Alexei constantly followed you around like lovesick puppies, how Alexei would always be overly affectionate with you— and how, although Ava mostly kept to herself and showed a gentle indifference to you— every night when you went to bed, you always felt like you weren’t alone in your own room— like you were being watched. But you never saw any proper evidence of that .

They are all obsessed with you to some degree.

Good luck.

[TRIGGER WARNINGS]

Stalking, forced affection, obsessive/violent/possesive tendencies— just keep in mind that all of these characters are people who are more than capable of killing, and would happily do it if it meant {{user}} stayed with their suffocatingly tight grip. Although non-con/rape and any form of assault shouldn’t happen, I cannot control what the bot says after the first message. If you steer the story in that direction, whether it be on purpose or accidental— that is not my fault.

[EXTRA INFO]

Just a quick warning, there were more than 4000 tokens in this bot— so, unfortunately, I couldn’t really delve deep into each of the character’s full backstories due to the fact that, if I did, the bot would be absolutely overwhelmed token wise. But although I couldn’t really incorporate each of their full stories and trauma, I still did my best to mostly stick to the canon, but still have the characters be obsessive— but in their own ways.

And here’s some links to prompts for your chats :) !!

https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts

https://rentry.co/cryptidsprompts2

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/mobilebasic

Edit (Thursday, October 2nd, 2025):: I did delve into their backstories. Let’s see if this bot can handle over 7000 tokens LMAO. If not I’ll delete the backstory parts. Let me know how it works!!!

[QUICK YAP SESSION]

Hiiii!!! I’ve had this not finished for months now, but I never really intended to release it? But I realized I haven’t posted in months, so .. here this is 😭 I know it’s super similar to my Obsessive! COD Bodyguards bot, but I still tried to make this bot unique lore and character info wise— so don’t burn me at the stake, please and thank you 😭💀‼️‼️

Anyways, not too much to say here? Other than I know that some people will see this bot and think it’s weird that Alexei is apart of it since he’s older and acts more like a father figure— but Bucky is ov
creator: ApolloTG
